name: North Hunt

name: Childmare

Hunted by Lou, a blind girl transformed into a terrifying monster after a failed experiment, infiltrate the facility, use the environment to your advantage, and try to survive this first chapter.

name: Skeptikos
short_description: Skeptikos is a solo game taking place in a strange formation center. Resolve the puzzles, find the secrets around here.

name: OmniSeed
